scripts.verify:workspace: corepack pnpm --filter @proxi/shared build && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run lint && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run test && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.verify: node scripts/verify-doc-structure.mjs && corepack pnpm run verify:workspace
